description_long: This kiosk features a compact, rectangular structure with a wood-paneled exterior and metallic frame accents. The upper section is enclosed, with a small, square, dark feature on the front that may be a camera or sensor. The lower section is open and contains a grid of green pots filled with soil, some of which show small plant sprouts. The rear and sides are mostly solid wood panels, while the front displays a logo with hands and a leaf, suggesting an eco-friendly or plant-related function. The overall design is modern and functional, with a flat roof and clean lines.
description: A modern, wood-paneled kiosk with a metal frame, featuring a plant display area and eco-themed logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood paneling, a small square sensor or camera, and green pots with soil and sprouts.
description_view_1: Rear view with solid wood paneling and the backs of the green pots visible, no logo or sensor.
description_view_2: Front view similar to view 0, but with more visible plant sprouts in the pots.
description_view_3: Front view with a visible eco-themed logo above the plant display, wood paneling, and green pots.
attribute_signage_type: Printed logo with hands and leaf, placed on the upper front wood panel.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with wood paneling, no overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: modern with minimalist and eco-friendly influences
